description: An auditor reviews compliance with the company's records management policy, focusing on the storage of physical records.

nodes.task_description: Perform an inspection of the on-site records storage room.

expected_outcome.expected: The auditor inspects the physical storage area.

nodes.task_description: Observe that the room is unlocked and boxes are not labeled according to the policy's classification scheme.

expected_outcome.expected: The auditor identifies several policy violations related to physical security and labeling.

nodes.task_description: Recommend that a log be kept for access to the records room and that all boxes be properly labeled.

expected_outcome.expected: Specific recommendations are made to improve the records management process.
